Bash("C:\\Users\\andre\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\Python\\Python312\\python.exe" -u -c "
import sys, io
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8'\)
from docx import Document
doc = Document\('D:/Projects/finsight/receipt_pipeline_design.docx'\)
capture = False
for p in doc.paragraphs:
    t = p.text.strip\(\)
    if not t:
        continue
    if '9. Unknown Store' in t:
        capture = True
    if capture:
        print\(t\)
    if '10. Framework Stack' in t:
        capture = False
" 2>&1)
